name: Paella Panamanian Style
recipeIngredient: 4 Pork Chops, Cut Into Small Cubes
2 Pounds Pork Sausage, Cut Into Small Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut and fry the chicken well.
2. Make a sauce with 1 1/2 onions, 1 1/2 green peppers, 1 1/2 tomatoes, cut up, and 3 cloves of garlic. Add 1 cup water and chicken stock on low heat.
3. Fry the sausage in small pieces and the pork chops separately.
4. Boil the lobsters and shrimp; peel them. Clean and slice clams, squid, and mussels.
5. Make a sauce with 1 1/2 onions, 1 1/2 green peppers, 1 1/2 tomatoes, and chick pea liquid. Cook the clams with scallions and parsley.
6. Make another sauce with remaining onion, scallion, finely chopped green pepper, tomato paste, and tomato sauce.
7. Wash rice well (3 times) and in a large, deep pot, fry 6 tablespoons oil. Add the liquid from cooked seafood (about 5 cups). Add sausage, chicken, pork with their sauces, small shrimp, sliced lobster, clams, squid, mussels, and their sauces. Also add both sauces, chick peas, and olives.
8. Cook at high heat for 10 minutes; then cover pot and cook on low heat for 45 minutes.
9. When ready to serve, decorate with strips of green peppers and olives.
